prompt: Fix the bug in the add function. The tests are failing because add(1, 2) should return 3, not -1.

metadata.description: Simple operator bug: add function uses subtraction instead of addition

prompt: Fix the integer_divide function. It should return an integer result using floor division, but currently it returns a float.

metadata.description: Wrong division operator: integer_divide uses / instead of //

prompt: Fix the greet function. It should return a formatted string with the name inserted, but currently it returns the literal '{name}' placeholder.

metadata.description: String formatting bug: greet uses literal string instead of f-string or format()

prompt: Fix the inclusive_count function. It should return a list from 0 to n inclusive, but currently it excludes n.

metadata.description: Off-by-one bug: inclusive_count uses range(n) instead of range(n+1)

prompt: Fix the filter_positive function. It should return only positive numbers (> 0), but currently it also includes zero.

metadata.description: Wrong filter condition: filter_positive uses 'or' instead of proper positive-only check

prompt: Fix the max_of function. It should return the larger of two values, but currently it returns the smaller one.

metadata.description: Wrong comparison logic: max_of returns the smaller value instead of larger

prompt: Clean up the formatting in banner.py. Keep the behavior the same, but replace tab indentation with spaces so the formatting test passes.

metadata.description: Formatting cleanup: replace tab indentation with spaces in the source file

prompt: Remove the lint issues in greeter.py. Keep greet() returning the same value, but remove the debug print and the unused import so the tests pass.

metadata.description: Lint cleanup: remove an unused import and a debug print without changing behavior

prompt: Fix the type hints in repeat.py. The runtime behavior is already correct, but the annotations should describe a string input, an integer repeat count, and a string return value.

metadata.description: Type hint correction: repair incorrect parameter and return annotations

prompt: Fix the type hints in tracking.py. The function should keep returning the same tracking-code string, but the suffix annotation and return annotation are currently wrong.

metadata.description: Type hint correction: repair mismatched suffix and return annotations

prompt: Add support for an optional prefix argument to build_label in labels.py. The default behavior should stay the same, and when prefix is provided the function should return 'prefix:name'.

metadata.description: Small feature: add an optional prefix parameter while preserving existing behavior

prompt: Implement the missing normalization behavior in normalize.py. The function should still trim whitespace, and it should also title-case each word so the name formatting tests pass.

metadata.description: Small feature: extend normalization to title-case names after trimming
